title: Home
text: This is my new Quarto website, powered by RStudio and GitHub Pages.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
text: This is a Tic-Tac-Toe game I built using Processing. The player can play against the computer and switch between different difficulty levels.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
text: This is a Tic-Tac-Toe game I built using Processing. The player can play against the computer and switch between different difficulty levels.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
text:
How to Play
Click on an open square to place your move.

Controls

Press E for easy mode
Press H for hard mode
Press R to reset the game

title: About
text:
Dylan Rogers majors in Mathematics and minors in Data Analytics at SUNY Geneseo. When not working on math or data analytics, Dylan enjoys spending time skiing and snowboarding with his friends.

Education
State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY  B.A. in Mathematics | Aug 2022 - May 2026  Minor in Data Analytics
